acceptance.label: Authoritative shared coordination payloads write schema_version 2 plan, task, and dependency records without root_tasks or durable native plan-node execution state.
Local SQLite stores disposable v2 snapshots and read-model tables that can be rebuilt from shared state plus runtime overlays.
Task and plan persistence cleanly separates durable authored fields from derived status, blocker, and estimate materializations.

payload.summary: Persisted canonical v2 coordination snapshots through shared refs, checkpoints, hydration, and MCP task/claim mutation paths; validated on rebuilt release binaries with healthy daemon restart.
payload.title: Build v2 shared-ref and SQLite persistence around explicit parent refs, plan operator state, task lifecycle and executor policy, and dependency rows keyed by NodeRef
